text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Agnes Digital busily working in
front of a supermarket.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hi, come on in! Carrots are on sale for cheap
today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey! You're a trainer from Tracen, right? Why
don't you take this opportunity to buy some
carrots for your trainee?

text_block_list.name: Supermarket Owner
text_block_list.text: Great work, Digital! Thanks for your help today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oops, I'd better head to my next destination
ASAP! Time to put these legs I've strengthened
through racing and simping to use!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following this, I start spotting Agnes Digital
practically everywhere.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Our bakery's open for business again after
renovations! Come check out our Horsegirl-shaped
carrot bread!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Heya! Here's your House of Speed carrot ramen!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The newest line of face powders has just come in!
We have all kinds of cosmetics made for
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not that they need any makeup since their skin's
always so flawless! Teehuehue...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she's working from morning till night.
I'm curious as to why, so I decide to ask her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I've been running into you a lot... Are you
trying to trigger some sort of event?
choice_data_list: Why are you working so many jobs?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hehe, glad you asked!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
One of my fave's long-awaited photo book will be
releasing soon, and she's holding a signing event!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Autograph sessions like these are big moments
for my oshis, and as a fan, I can't attend them
wearing just any old outfit!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I always make it a point to wear something nice
that'll match the person I'm meeting!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's doing what's proper! Meeting your oshi is a
special occasion! When else would I dress up?!
choice_data_list: What kind of person is your oshi?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: She's an angel... No, a veritable goddess!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if you want to know the date and location of
the book signing, here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital hands me a flyer detailing the
information of the event.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I bet you're wondering why I just happen to be
carrying that around, huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's because a true fan should always be equipped
to spread the good word!
choice_data_list: Being an Horsegirl simp is no joke...

Looking up to someone can be really
motivating, huh?

Looking up to someone can be really
motivating, huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's because a true fan should always be equipped
to spread the good word!
choice_data_list: Being an Horsegirl simp is no joke...

Looking up to someone can be really
motivating, huh?

Looking up to someone can be really
motivating, huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Best of luck to us both at the event! Oh... I'm so
excited, there's no way I'm getting any sleep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm so impressed by Agnes Digital's fervor that I
end up going to her favorite Umamusume's book
signing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the vast number of fans there, the
Umamusume in question gives each of them great
individual attention.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you went to the signing event too? I knew
you had potential in you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There was a celebratory flower display put
together by all the fans who've been supporting
her since day one... It was so touching!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What's more, I was able to make a new simp
friend! I couldn't have asked for a more bountiful
harvest!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Teehuehue! No need to be so modest about it!
You're already a model simp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I see Agnes Digital while walking
through the central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
How was the signing event? Was she not the most
precious thing in the entire WORLD?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Teehuehue... I bet you want to dress a little nicer
next time you meet your oshi now, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Speaking of which, I need to start putting
together my next outfit too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well, see you at the next event! Let's cheer on
our oshis with all our heart!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! If it's for the sake of my oshis, I'll work
day and night and overcome any obstacle!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mwaheehee... If that isn't the best thing ever, I
don't know what is!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Of course, your trainee is also a divine idol who
gives me strength.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It goes without saying, but I'm a huge simp for
every single Horsegirl at Tracen! Huehue! ♪
